title: Labcorp to Announce Second Quarter Financial Results on July 27, 2023
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 29, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2023 before the market opens on Thursday, July 27, 2023.

title: Fortrea Holdings and PHINIA Set to Join S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , June 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices will make the following changes to the S&P SmallCap 600 effective prior to the opening of trading on Thursday, July 6: Fortrea Holdings Inc. (NASD:FTRE) will replace Seneca Foods Corp. (NASD:SENEA). S&P 500 constituent Laboratory Corporation of America Holdings (NYSE:LH) is spinning off Fortrea Holdings in a transaction expected to be completed on July 3.

title: Laboratory Corporation: Predictability Of Cash Flows Less Visible
text: Laboratory Corporation has visible headwinds to growth ahead. The company's return on capital employed has lagged behind the required rate of return in the last two periods. Net-net, reiterate that LH stock is a hold, valuation of $221.

title: Labcorp Awarded Forrester Research 2023 Customer Obsession Leadership Award
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, is pleased to share that its executive vice president and chief marketing officer, Amy Summy, has been awarded the inaugural Forrester Customer Obsession Leadership Award, recognizing senior executives who put customers at the center of everything they do to accelerate business growth, retain customers and enable greater employee engagement.

title: LABCORP ANNOUNCES PRICING OF FORTREA $570 MILLION NOTES OFFERING IN CONNECTION WITH ANTICIPATED FORTREA SPINOFF
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, today announced that Fortrea Holdings Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Labcorp ("Fortrea"), has priced an offering of $570 million of senior secured notes due 2030 (the "Notes"), in connection with the previously announced spinoff of Fortrea into a separate publicly traded company (the "Spinoff").

title: LABCORP ANNOUNCES ADDITIONAL INFORMATION IN CONNECTION WITH ITS SPIN-OFF OF FORTREA
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, previously announced the following record and distribution dates for its spin-off of Fortrea Holdings Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Labcorp ("Fortrea"): The record date will be 5:00 p.m.

title: LabCorp (LH) Gives Update as Fortrea Spinoff Nears Closure
text: Fortrea is set to comprise Labcorp's (LH) Clinical Development and Commercialization Services businesses.

title: Labcorp Announces Information in Connection with its Spin-off of Fortrea
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, today announced the following record and distribution dates for the spin-off of Fortrea Holdings Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Labcorp ("Fortrea"): The record date will be 5 p.m.

title: Labcorp Announces Launch of Fortrea's Notes Offering in Connection with Anticipated Spinoff
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, today announced that Fortrea Holdings Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Labcorp ("Fortrea"), has launched an offering of senior secured notes due 2030 (the "Notes"), subject to market conditions and other customary factors, in connection with the previously announced spinoff of Fortrea into a separate publicly traded company (the "Spinoff").

title: LabCorp (LH) Provides Update on Planned Spinoff of Fortrea
text: After separation from LabCorp (LH), Fortrea is set to operate as a global contract research organization that offers comprehensive drug and medical device development services.

title: Labcorp Appoints Dr. Paul Rothman to Board of Directors
text: Health system executive brings three decades of medical enterprise experience to Labcorp BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, today announced the appointment of Dr. Paul Rothman to its Board of Directors as an independent member.

title: Labcorp's Planned Spin-off, Fortrea, to Host 2023 Investor Day
text: BURLINGTON, N.C. , June 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a leading global life sciences company, today announced Fortrea, the new company to be formed by the planned spin-off of Labcorp's Clinical Development and Commercialization Services business, will host its inaugural Investor Day on Tuesday, June 6, 2023, in New York City at 9 a.m.

title: LabCorp (LH) Expands Precision Oncology With Biopsy Test
text: The addition of Labcorp Plasma Focus marks a pivotal step in the expansion of LabCorp's (LH) suite of precision oncology tests.
